nasb.text: When they had done this, they enclosed a great quantity of fish, and their nets began to break;

esv.text: And when they had done this, they enclosed a large number of fish, and their nets were breaking.

cnv.text: 他們下了網，就圈住很多魚，網幾乎裂開，

ccb.text: 他们把网撒下去，果然捕获很多鱼，差点把网撑破了，

csbs.text: 他们这样做了，网住了一大群鱼，渔网几乎要撑破。
